title: Funded-lane large-scale benchmark run under a hard budget cap
context: Some large-scale benchmark computations (e.g. Random Survival Forest with hyperparameter tuning on a large multi-omics dataset, or nested CV with many outer folds on a large expression matrix) may exceed what is feasible in a single donated compute session. This is a funded-lane task for any such oversized benchmark run, subject to a hard per-task escrow budget cap that must never be exceeded. The funded lane requires an API key, a hard fundedBudgetUsd cap, and a cost ledger entry. No funded compute may run without a confirmed budget cap. This task is a placeholder and is only activated if a specific benchmark run is identified as too large for donated compute and a donor budget is confirmed.
objective: If and only if a specific large-scale benchmark run is identified as infeasible on donated compute and a donor budget is confirmed: execute the oversized benchmark run in the funded lane under a hard budget cap, with full cost ledger recording; all other project requirements (gate-002 passage, leakage-audit passage, external cohort, provenance triples) apply unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: This task is only activated when a specific benchmark run is confirmed as infeasible on donated compute and a confirmed donor budget is available; without both conditions this task remains a placeholder and is not started
The funded run operates under a hard fundedBudgetUsd cap that must never be exceeded; if the run is projected to exceed the cap it is halted and the situation escalated before proceeding
All cost incurred is recorded in the cost ledger with a public entry (provider, model/compute type, task id, cost in USD, date); no cost is hidden or unrecorded
All project requirements apply to the funded run identically: gate-002 passage for all data, full leakage-audit suite passing in CI, declared external cohort, provenance triples on every number
No API key, token, or credential is written to logs, model cards, leaderboard entries, or committed files
Maintainer sign-off confirms the funded-lane activation decision and the budget cap are recorded before the run starts
output: A merged PR delivering the large-scale benchmark run results within the hard budget cap, with a public cost ledger entry, full leakage-audit passage, and provenance triples — or a recorded decision that the task remains a placeholder pending budget confirmation.
